name: oriel
description: Oriel — the agent control surface for the shared Agent Board (Workspace > Project > Epic > Story > Task). A remote, Supabase-backed MCP server with OAuth, plus a single /oriel command — give it an idea or a subcommand (start/stop project · add epic · design · rethink design · analyze · questions · quick/detail/remaining report · where were we · continue · demo · walk · debug · fix · update board · tick · start/stop loop · check board) and the PD analyses it and loads live operating skills.
